title: cert.expiry Facet
description: Demanded by the cert-issuer Connector's Syncer (charter §2.1, §2.4, ADR-0030): the validity window of an issued X.509 certificate, projected from the CLM. The notAfter timestamp is the Baseline-side expiry-threshold check's subject (a Certificate Blueprint asserts it is at least renewBefore in the future). A Facet schema exists only when a shipping Contract demands it (§1.1).
